briefs.title: Council to Consider Renewing Cisco Software Contracts Worth $442,779
briefs.summary: Burnaby City Council is set to vote on renewing two Cisco software contracts — one for call centre software (UCCX) and one for video conferencing (WebEx) — totalling roughly $442,779 for the renewal period, an 18.6% increase over the previous term due to higher unit prices.
briefs.action_required: Watch for the council decision — this affects City tech spending but has no direct compliance impact on most small businesses.

key_dates.label: Cisco WebEx contract renewal pending Council approval — start date
Cisco WebEx 1st renewal term ends — Burnaby City contract
